query: I have a dataset with 50K rows of customer behavior. I need to predict churn. What model should I use and what features should I engineer?
expected_behavior: Agent activates data-wizard skill via auto-detection
Agent routes to Model Selection mode for churn prediction
Agent recommends models appropriate for 50K rows (medium data size)
Agent includes baseline model recommendation (Logistic Regression)
Agent suggests feature engineering approaches for behavioral data
Agent warns about target leakage with time-based features
